ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the facility */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the facility */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the facility manager */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the facility */,
  "industry_type" TEXT /* Industry type of the facility */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection for the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES managers ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "managers" (
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manager */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Full name of the manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the manager */,
  "title" TEXT /* Job title of the manager */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspections" (
  "inspection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspection */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility being inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date when the inspection took place */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes taken during the inspection */,
  "inspection_type" TEXT /* Type of inspection (regular or special audit) */,
  "equipment_used" TEXT /* Equipment used during the inspection */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inspections_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES inspectors ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inspectors" (
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inspector */,
  "inspector_name" TEXT /* Full name of the inspector */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the inspector */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the inspector (e.g., Safety Officer, Compliance Manager) */,
  "certifications" TEXT /* Certifications held by the inspector */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience for the inspector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inspector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance item */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the compliance item */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category for grouping compliance items */,
  "subcategory" TEXT /* Subcategory for further grouping */,
  "standard" TEXT /* Standard that the compliance item adheres to */,
  "regulation_reference" TEXT /* Reference to relevant regulations or laws */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance status record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility for which the status is recorded */,
  "total_items" INTEGER /* Total number of compliance items inspected */,
  "items_ok" INTEGER /* Number of items marked as OK */,
  "items_fix" INTEGER /* Number of items requiring fixes */,
  "items_na" INTEGER /* Number of items marked as N/A */,
  "overall_status" TEXT /* Summary status of the facility (Compliant, Non-Compliant, Pending) */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_status_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_procedures" (
  "procedure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency procedure */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility for which the procedure applies */,
  "procedure_type" TEXT /* Type of emergency procedure */,
  "procedure_desc" TEXT /* Description of the emergency procedure */,
  "revision_number" INTEGER /* Revision number of the procedure */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the procedure was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("procedure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_procedures_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_data_sheets" (
  "sds_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SDS record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility to which this SDS pertains */,
  "chemical_name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the chemical */,
  "sds_link" TEXT /* Link to the SDS document */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the SDS will expire */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the SDS was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sds_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_data_sheets_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fire_safety_checks" (
  "check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fire safety check */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the check was performed */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment inspected */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of fire safety check */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of equipment inspected */,
  "inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the inspection */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the inspection (OK, needs service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fire_safety_checks_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each emergency contact */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility for which this contact is designated */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Full name of the emergency contact */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of emergency contact */,
  "contact_role" TEXT /* Role of the emergency contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_contacts_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training session */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the session was conducted */,
  "session_date" TEXT /* Date of the training session */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer who conducted the session */,
  "session_type" TEXT /* Type of training session */,
  "materials_provided" TEXT /* Materials provided during the session */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the training content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_sessions_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the trainer */,
  "trainer_type" TEXT /* Type of trainer */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Area of expertise for the trainer */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the trainer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)
